summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SEO feature (sitemap, per-route meta tag injection, location landing redirects). Created /app/backend/tests/test_seo.py with 53 pytest tests - ALL PASSED. Frontend location landing redirects verified via Playwright for /handforth, /timperley, /middlewich - all correctly pre-select the location and redirect to /menu-catalog.

issues: Pre-existing React console warning: 'React does not recognize the fetchPriority prop on a DOM element' (in Header.jsx img). Not related to SEO work but should be lowercased (fetchpriority) or filtered.

action_items: No critical action items. SEO implementation is working as specified. Optional: fix pre-existing `fetchPriority` React warning in Header.jsx (unrelated to this task).
critical_code_review_comments: seo.py inject_meta_tags uses string replace on '</head>' — safe since the template has exactly one </head>. OK.
seo.py removes only the FIRST existing <title> and meta[name=description] via re.sub count=1 — correct since the built index.html has exactly one of each.
Sitemap uses datetime.now(timezone.utc) (good, non-deprecated). 11 URLs correctly generated (6 core + 5 locations).
LocationLanding waits on locations.length before navigating — correct pattern to avoid race. Spinner shown meanwhile.
BASE_URL hardcoded in seo.py to https://www.jollyskafe.com — acceptable for production SEO canonical URLs, but a small note if ever moved to multi-env setup.
Catch-all route in server.py correctly returns static files from build dir first, then falls back to HTML with injected SEO. Order is correct.
test_credentials: admin@jollys.com / Admin123! (not used for SEO tests — feature is public)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend SEO injection only works when hitting localhost:8001 directly (NOT via the external preview URL, which routes non-/api traffic to Vite). /app/backend/tests/test_seo.py uses BASE_URL=http://localhost:8001 for this reason. Frontend React routing tests (redirects) use the external preview URL. All 11 sitemap URLs, all 5 location landing pages (title/desc/canonical/OG/JSON-LD CafeOrCoffeeShop), all 4 core page meta tags (/, /menu-catalog, /contact-us, /jklocations) pass. Exactly ONE <title> and ONE meta[name=description] per page verified. Frontend LocationLanding correctly sets location context and redirects to /menu-catalog.
rca of the issue: N/A — all tests passed. No bugs found in SEO implementation.
